title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that wraps Ollama for chat, LLM, and embeddings components.

title: llama-index-integrations-llms-ollama
summary: LlamaIndex LLM and embedding drivers for Ollama; build RAG pipelines on local models.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (formerly Ollama-WebUI); model manager, multi-user, markdown & code highlighting.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with sync/async APIs, streaming, and embedding support.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI wrapper that adds chat history, prompt templates, and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot plugin that routes completions through local Ollama models.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU and PVC support.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & GPU) and compose examples for Ollama.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaEmbedder nodes.

title: ollama-nestjs
summary: NestJS module that injects an Ollama service with RxJS streaming support.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for Ollama with chat, completions, embeddings, and model management.

title: ollama-dotnet
summary: .NET client for Ollama with strongly-typed models and IAsyncEnumerable streaming.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Official Rust crate providing async wrappers over the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-curl
summary: Collection of copy-paste curl snippets for every Ollama REST endpoint.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to provision an Ollama instance on AWS EC2 with GPU.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a command to summarize or continue writing notes using a local Ollama model.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that streams Ollama chat completions into channels or DMs.
